questions.question: How clearly does the candidate communicate their ideas?
How confident and professional is the candidate during the interview?
What stood out about the candidate's communication style?
How strong is the candidate's understanding of core technical concepts?
How well does the candidate solve technical problems during the interview?
What are the candidate's strongest and weakest technical areas?
How well does the candidate demonstrate teamwork and collaboration?
How adaptable is the candidate when discussing challenges or change?
What behavioral observations are important for the hiring team to note?
